## Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`./gradlew :composer:test :composer-compose:test`)
- [ ] Binary compatibility check passes (`./gradlew :composer:apiCheck :composer-compose:apiCheck`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
